div1.entryFree:
Fordo (orthogr. of M. Edd.) or Foredo (orth. of O. Edd.) 1) to undo, destroy: --es itself, Hml. II, 1, 103. f. its own life, V, 1, 244. she fordid herself, Lr. V, 3, 255. have --ne themselves, Lr. V, 3, 255 this is the night that either makes me or --es me, Oth. V, 1, 129.
2) to overcome, to exhaust: all with weary task --ne, Mids. V, 381.
